title: SAP aligns commerce data for AI personalisation
slides: How does SAP unify scattered commerce data for AI?
It connects silos from ERP and CRM systems.
Most firms still rely on manual data cleaning.
Your AI models finally get real-time, consistent inputs.
Stop building data pipelines—use SAP's unified layer.
thread_text:
Your AI is only as good as your data.

Most firms still clean data by hand—70% of AI project time is wasted on manual prep.

SAP connects ERP and CRM silos.

One unified layer pulls scattered commerce data into a single stream.

No more building custom pipelines.

SAP’s layer feeds your AI models directly, in real time.

Consistent inputs mean reliable outputs.

Your models stop choking on dirty, outdated data from disconnected sources.

Can your current stack survive without a unified data layer?

Check if your ERP and CRM already talk to each other—if not, start with SAP this quarter.
video_script: Your AI needs clean data to work.
SAP connects scattered silos in one layer.
No more building pipelines by hand.
Your models get real-time, consistent inputs now.
Start with SAP's unified layer today.

script: Your AI needs clean data to work.
SAP connects scattered silos in one layer.
No more building pipelines by hand.
Your models get real-time, consistent inputs now.
Start with SAP's unified layer today.

instagram.caption:
70% of AI project time is wasted manually cleaning data — most companies still do this by hand. 😵

SAP just connected ERP and CRM silos into a single unified data layer. No more building custom pipelines. Your AI models get real-time, consistent inputs directly.

That means you can stop wrestling with dirty spreadsheets and broken integrations, and start shipping features that actually work with fresh data.

Is your current toolchain ready for that, or are you still patching together data feeds by hand? 🛠️
